ArchitectureNotes.objective: Employee Monitor — система контроля расходов и суммаризации задач 12 сотрудников через LLM, поверх существующего Polza.AI Dashboard.
ArchitectureNotes.non-goal: Не строить отдельное приложение — расширяем существующий Flask + SPA. Не заменять sync/backfill — дополняем.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-1: Rate limit Polza.AI API при массовой загрузке логов для summarization — mitigated through batching and delay.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-2: LLM может некорректно классифицировать рабочее/личное — нужен аккуратный промпт + human-in-the-loop через UI.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-3: 8 из 12 ключей не имеют session_id — для них только агрегация без AI-анализа.

contract.purpose: Flask web-server v3: DB-backed API + proxy + background threads for sync/backfill
SQLAlchemy ORM: api_keys + generations tables in PostgreSQL
Background thread: incremental sync every 5 min + session_id enrichment
Background thread: enrich session_id/device_id for historical records
SPA dashboard: table, charts, sidebar, sessions, backfill indicator
Parse API keys from Excel paste, .env, free text
SQLAlchemy model + CRUD for session_summaries table — caches LLM summaries per session
contract.scope: CREATE TABLE, upsert, read by session_id, read by source_key, count without summary
contract.inputs: session_id, summary text, topic, is_work, risk_flags

export-SessionSummary.PURPOSE: ORM model: session_id, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost, created_at, updated_at

fn-get_or_none.PURPOSE: Get summary by session_id, return None if not cached

fn-upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary for a session_id

fn-list_by_key.PURPOSE: List summaries for an employee within date range

fn-count_without_summary.PURPOSE: Count sessions that don't have a summary yet

notes.note-1: Added to db.py alongside existing ApiKey and Generation models. init_db() creates the table via create_all().

contract.purpose: Fast aggregated report per employee for a time period — pure SQL, no AI, instant response
contract.scope: Single endpoint returning cost/tokens/sessions/anomalies for one or all employees
contract.outputs: JSON: total cost, tokens, request count, session list, anomaly flags, hourly heatmap, comparison vs previous period

fn-report.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report — aggregated data for one or all employees

fn-report_list.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report/list — summary table: each employee with cost/tokens/requests for period

notes.note-1: All queries are pure SQLAlchemy aggregation — no external API calls, millisecond response.

M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER.NAME: Session Summarizer

contract.purpose: LLM-powered summarization of a chat session — extracts task, topic, work/personal classification from user messages
contract.scope: Load generation logs via detail API, extract user prompts, send to Polza.AI LLM (Haiku), parse structured response, cache in DB
contract.outputs: summary text, topic, is_work boolean, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost

errors.error: Session has no generations in DB
Polza.AI detail or chat API returned error
LLM response could not be parsed as structured data

M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER.interface: <fn-summarize_session PURPOSE="Summarize single session — returns from cache or calls LLM <fn-summarize_all PURPOSE="POST /api/session/summarize-all — background thread for all sessions of an employee <fn-summarize_status PURPOSE="GET /api/session/summarize/status — polling endpoint for background progress

notes.note-1: Uses Polza.AI API (Основной ключ) with Haiku model for cheap summarization (~$0.005/session).
notes.note-2: Background thread pattern same as M-BACKFILL — start/stop/status + topbar indicator.

contract.purpose: Detect suspicious usage patterns: off-hours, weekends, unusual models, burst activity, cost spikes
contract.scope: Called by M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT to annotate employee data with anomaly flags
contract.inputs: Employee generation records for a period
contract.outputs: List of anomaly objects: type, severity, details

fn-detect.PURPOSE: Analyze employee records, return anomaly list

notes.note-1: Pure computation — no external API. Rules-based, not ML.
notes.note-2: Anomaly types: OFF_HOURS (22:00-08:00), WEEKEND, UNUSUAL_MODEL, BURST_50_PLUS, COST_SPIKE_200_PCT.

contract.purpose: Frontend: employee list with costs, drill-down report with sessions, summaries, anomalies, heatmap
contract.scope: New tab "📊 По сотрудникам", employee report modal/page, summarize buttons
contract.inputs: API responses from M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT and M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER

fn-load_employees.PURPOSE: Load employee list with aggregated costs for period

fn-render_employee_report.PURPOSE: Render full report for selected employee

fn-trigger_summarize.PURPOSE: POST to start summarization, begin polling

notes.note-1: Added as new group-tab "📊 По сотрудникам" in existing tab bar.

DF-001.NAME: Employee Report (instant)
DF-001.step-2: Backend queries PostgreSQL: SUM(cost), COUNT(*), GROUP BY session_id for employee M-ANOMALY scans records for off-hours, weekends, burst, cost spike Backend joins with session_summaries (if any) for enriched data JSON response: {employee, period, totals, sessions[], anomalies[], heatmap[]} [EmployeeReport][report] returns JSON with totals + sessions + anomalies

DF-002.NAME: Session Summarize (on-demand)
DF-002.TRIGGER: Admin clicks Summarize on a session card
DF-002.step-2: M-SUMMARY-STORE checks cache — if hit, return immediately
DF-002.step-3: Cache miss: load all generation IDs for this session from generations table
DF-002.step-4: BLOCK_FETCH_LOGS: For each generation, call GET /v1/history/generations/{id}/log via Polza.AI API
DF-002.step-5: Extract user messages from response logs, concatenate (first 500 chars each, max 20 messages)
DF-002.step-6: BLOCK_CALL_LLM: POST /v1/chat/completions to Polza.AI with Haiku — structured prompt requesting summary/topic/is_work
DF-002.step-7: BLOCK_PARSE_RESPONSE: Parse LLM JSON response into structured fields
DF-002.step-9: Return JSON: {sessionId, summary, topic, isWork, projectGuess, riskFlags, llmCost}

DF-003.NAME: Summarize All (background)
DF-003.TRIGGER: Admin clicks Summarize All for employee
DF-003.step-2: Backend starts background thread (like M-BACKFILL pattern)
DF-003.step-3: Thread iterates sessions without summary, calls DF-002 for each
DF-003.step-4: Progress tracked in global _summarize dict: {running, done, total, errors}
DF-003.step-5: Frontend polls GET /api/session/summarize/status every 2s — topbar indicator
DF-003.step-6: When done, frontend refreshes employee report view

DF-004.NAME: Anomaly Detection (computed)
DF-004.TRIGGER: Part of DF-001 — no separate trigger
DF-004.step-1: M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT passes employee generations to M-ANOMALY.detect()
DF-004.step-2: Rule 1: OFF_HOURS — any generation with createdAt hour in 22:00-08:00 local time
DF-004.step-3: Rule 2: WEEKEND — any generation on Saturday/Sunday
DF-004.step-4: Rule 3: UNUSUAL_MODEL — model not in employee's top 3 models
DF-004.step-5: Rule 4: BURST — more than 50 generations in any 1-hour window
DF-004.step-6: Rule 5: COST_SPIKE — current period cost > 3x average of last 3 same-length periods
DF-004.step-7: Returns list of {type, severity, details} objects
DF-004.evidence: [Anomaly][detect] returns anomaly list with types and details

Phase-1.name: Employee Report (no AI)
Phase-1.goal: Fast aggregated employee view — instant value, zero AI cost, pure SQL
Phase-1.step-1: Add SessionSummary model to db.py + CREATE TABLE via migration script
Phase-1.step-2: Implement anomaly detection rules in polza_dashboard.py
Phase-1.step-4: Add "📊 По сотрудникам" tab, employee list, drill-down report, heatmap
Phase-1.step-5: CSS for employee cards, anomaly badges, heatmap

Phase-2.name: Session Summarizer (LLM)
Phase-2.goal: AI-powered session analysis — task, topic, work/personal classification
Phase-2.step-1: Implement single-session summarize with LLM call + caching
Phase-2.step-2: Add background summarize-all thread with status polling
Phase-2.step-3: Add Summarize/Summarize All buttons, topbar indicator, cached summary display

Phase-3.name: Polish & Deploy
Phase-3.goal: Final integration, edge cases, full deploy
Phase-3.step-1: Add employee summary aggregation (all summaries into one report)
Phase-3.step-2: Final UI polish, mobile responsive, error states
Phase-3.step-3: Full deploy to VM, verify with real data

ExecutionPolicy.worker-owns: Only module source files and module-local tests inside the approved write scope.
